briefs.title: Specific Supportive Housing Properties Get a Special Tax Class for 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its property classification rules (the system that determines how a property is assessed and taxed) to designate certain eligible supportive housing properties under a special class for the 2026 tax year. These properties are identified by specific assessment roll numbers listed in the regulation.
briefs.action_required: Check if your property's assessment roll number appears in B.C. Reg. 167/2025 Schedule B to confirm if it qualifies.

key_dates.label: BC supportive housing special property class designation takes effect — 2026 taxation year
